title: Fifa 2026 Female Football Travel Vlogger Identity Sequence
sourceTitle: Fifa 2026 Female Football Travel Vlogger Identity Sequence AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic FIFA World Cup 2026 travel-vlogger sequence featuring ultra-realistic adult female football travel vlogger with cheerful energetic personality across a joyful multi-location football journey. Subject: ultra-realistic adult female football travel vlogger with cheerful energetic personality keeps the same face, age, hairstyle, body proportions, skin tone, facial features, and cheerful personality across every scene. Scene: airport arrival, street food area, fan zone, stadium exterior, seat view, and celebration street covers the full supporter journey with authentic stadium travel atmosphere, crowds, fan zones, celebration streets, and energetic selfie moments. Composition: Identity-locked multi-scene sequence with Argentina-inspired jersey, Brazil cropped jacket, Mexico supporter jersey, USA sporty streetwear, fan dress, hoodie, varsity jacket, and football-themed streetwear, consistent accessories including small crossbody bag, football supporter scarf, wristbands, and stadium credentials, and natural movement during cheering, singing, dancing, peace signs, thumbs-up, finger hearts, laughing with supporters, celebrating goals, and recording selfie moments. Signature Elements: Preserved fifa 2026 female football travel vlogger identity sequence source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic travel-vlogger photography for a FIFA World Cup 2026 journey, natural hair physics, authentic expressions, cinematic sports tourism energy, and polished social campaign finish. Color Palette: Bright national-team inspired colors from Argentina, Brazil, Mexico, USA, and neutral supporter outfits balanced with realistic city tones, stadium lights, and clean daylight-to-night travel color. Lighting: Natural location lighting, stadium glow, street celebration highlights, airport daylight, fan-zone sunlight, and crisp phone-camera exposure across scenes. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
